text:

Author: marcus

Log:
  Add support for building wireshark with Qt 5 GUI support.  Note: not all of
  the GTK+ features have been ported to Qt yet.

  PR:		196728
  Submitted by:	olevole@olevole.ru

  head/net/wireshark/Makefile
  head/net/wireshark-qt5/
